purpose: Manual review list for Standard cards whose effects may require deck-tracker history state beyond remaining deck count.

source.note: Death Knight class is corrected from raw hsdata CLASS=1 because generated CardDef currently maps CLASS=1 to NEUTRAL.

criteria.caveat: This is an intentionally inclusive candidate list for human review; medium-priority Deathrattle/death-event rows may not all require special tracker logic.

cards.cardTextZhCN: 每当你施放一个法术，便获得等同于其法力值消耗的护甲值。
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 每当你施放一个法术，便获得等同于其法力值消耗的护甲值。

text.zhCN: 每当你施放一个法术，便获得等同于其法力值消耗的护甲值。
text.enUS: Whenever you cast a spell, gain Armor equal to its_Cost.
text.zhCNPlain: 每当你施放一个法术，便获得等同于其法力值消耗的护甲值。
text.enUSPlain: Whenever you cast a spell, gain Armor equal to its_Cost.

matchReasons: text depends on cards/actions used, played, cast, summoned, discarded, overloaded, or spent

cards.cardTextZhCN: 造成$3点伤害。注能（@）：将一张冰冻之触置入你的 手牌。
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 造成3点伤害。注能（）：将一张冰冻之触置入你的 手牌。

text.zhCN: 造成$3点伤害。注能（@）：将一张冰冻之触置入你的 手牌。
text.enUS: Deal $3 damage. Infuse (@): Add a Frozen Touch to your hand.
text.zhCNPlain: 造成3点伤害。注能（）：将一张冰冻之触置入你的 手牌。
text.enUSPlain: Deal 3 damage. Infuse (): Add a Frozen Touch to your hand.

matchReasons: Infuse/灌注/注能 depends on friendly deaths while the card is in hand

cards.cardTextZhCN: 法术伤害+2，亡语：你抽到的下一张随从牌会继承这些能力。
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 法术伤害+2，亡语：你抽到的下一张随从牌会继承这些能力。

text.zhCN: 法术伤害+2，亡语：你抽到的下一张随从牌会继承这些能力。
text.enUS: Spell Damage +2 Deathrattle: The next minion_you draw inherits these powers.
text.zhCNPlain: 法术伤害+2，亡语：你抽到的下一张随从牌会继承这些能力。
text.enUSPlain: Spell Damage +2 Deathrattle: The next minion_you draw inherits these powers.

matchReasons: text/mechanics includes or interacts with Deathrattle/亡语

cards.cardTextZhCN: 对所有随从造成$2点伤害。每消灭一个随从，召唤一个2/2的不稳定的骷髅。
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 对所有随从造成2点伤害。每消灭一个随从，召唤一个2/2的不稳定的骷髅。

text.zhCN: 对所有随从造成$2点伤害。每消灭一个随从，召唤一个2/2的不稳定的骷髅。
text.enUS:
Deal $2 damage to all minions. Summon a 2/2 Volatile Skeleton 
for each killed.
text.zhCNPlain: 对所有随从造成2点伤害。每消灭一个随从，召唤一个2/2的不稳定的骷髅。
text.enUSPlain: Deal 2 damage to all minions. Summon a 2/2 Volatile Skeleton for each killed.

matchReasons: text reacts to death/destruction events

cards.cardTextZhCN: 战吼：复活你的不稳定的骷髅。战场上放不下的骷髅会立即爆炸。@（复活@个）
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 战吼：复活你的不稳定的骷髅。战场上放不下的骷髅会立即爆炸。（复活个）

text.zhCN: 战吼：复活你的不稳定的骷髅。战场上放不下的骷髅会立即爆炸。@（复活@个）
text.enUS: [x]Battlecry: Resurrect your Volatile Skeletons. Any that can't fit on the battlefield instantly explode! @(@)
text.zhCNPlain: 战吼：复活你的不稳定的骷髅。战场上放不下的骷髅会立即爆炸。（复活个）
text.enUSPlain: [x]Battlecry: Resurrect your Volatile Skeletons. Any that can't fit on the battlefield instantly explode! ()

matchReasons: text references died/dead/resurrected card pools

reviewFields.rank: 1-based order within this class JSON file after the current sort.
reviewFields.cardRank: Alias of rank for manual review tools that expect cardRank.
reviewFields.cardTextZhCN: Original Simplified Chinese rules text, including markup.
reviewFields.cardTextZhCNPlain: Simplified Chinese rules text with markup stripped for easier reading.
